[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01100000 2
1 01101001 4
2 11110000 4
3 01010111 5
4 11101111 7
5 11111011 7
6 11110111 7
7 11111111 a

01 10 11011011 6
12 21 11011111 7
23 32 11010111 6
34 43 11111111 a match 7
45 54 01100000 2 match 0
56 65 11110110 6
67 76 11111001 6
70 07 01000011 3

02 20 00000100 1
13 31 00001000 1
24 42 00101000 2
35 53 10011111 6
46 64 10010110 4
57 75 00001111 4
60 06 10111010 5
71 17 10011000 3

03 30 11010011 5
14 41 11110111 7 match 6
25 52 01001000 2
36 63 01101001 4 match 1
47 74 01101111 6
50 05 01001100 3
61 16 01100001 3
72 27 01000111 4

04 40 00101100 3
15 51 10010111 5
26 62 10111110 6
37 73 10010000 2
